articles.title: Meta新AI模型能拉好友进照片
articles.summary: Meta发布Muse Image模型，可在Instagram等App中把其他用户“拉”进AI生成的图片里。
articles.why: 普通人能直接用AI玩出创意照片，社交互动更有趣，是AI工具普及的好例子。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 试试在Instagram或WhatsApp里用AI生成带朋友的照片，感受AI的趣味性。
articles.for_me: 直接相关！你可以用这个工具练习AI图像生成，顺便给英语学习笔记配图，提升学习趣味。

articles.title: Claude Cowork上线手机和网页
articles.summary: Anthropic的AI助手Claude Cowork从桌面端扩展到移动端和网页，Max用户先体验。
articles.why: AI助手随时可用，写作业、查资料、翻译英语都更方便，是新手入门的好工具。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 关注Claude Cowork的免费版何时开放，用它辅助英语写作和翻译练习。
articles.for_me: 非常有用！你可以用Claude Cowork练习英语写作、翻译句子，还能问AI备考问题，一举两得。

articles.title: 微软靠自研模型省钱
articles.summary: 微软开始多用自家AI模型，减少对外部供应商的依赖，以降低AI成本。
articles.why: 大公司转向自研模型，可能影响未来AI工具的价格和选择，用户需留意。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 留意微软AI产品（如Copilot）是否更便宜或功能变化，影响日常使用。
articles.for_me: 暂时不用管。但如果你用微软的AI工具（如Word里的Copilot），未来可能更便宜或更好用。

articles.title: Discord AI审核误封用户
articles.summary: Discord的AI审核系统出错，误将无害图片判定为违规，导致大量用户被错误封禁。
articles.why: AI审核不靠谱，普通人可能被误伤，提醒我们AI工具并非完美。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 使用AI工具时保持警惕，遇到误判可申诉，别盲目信任AI判断。
articles.for_me: 提醒你：用AI工具时别全信它，比如AI翻译可能出错，自己要多检查。

articles.title: 新App防AI诈骗：假绑架
articles.summary: Savi推出防AI诈骗App，能识别逼真的AI语音勒索电话，保护用户财产安全。
articles.why: AI诈骗越来越真，普通人需要工具保护自己，安全类AI应用值得关注。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 下载Savi App，了解AI诈骗手法，保护自己和家人。
articles.for_me: 直接相关！作为新手，学会用防诈骗工具保护自己，同时理解AI的潜在风险。

articles.title: 开源AI没抢走大公司饭碗
articles.summary: 分析称开源AI模型与前沿AI公司（如Anthropic）各占不同阶段，并非直接竞争。
articles.why: 开源AI和付费AI各有用途，用户可根据需求选择，不必盲目追贵。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 了解开源AI（如Llama）和付费AI（如Claude）的区别，按需选用。
articles.for_me: 备考AI研究生时，理解开源和闭源的区别是基础，这条新闻帮你建立行业认知。

articles.title: OpenAI要给美国家庭发钱？
articles.summary: OpenAI CEO提议将公司部分股权分给美国公民，每人可能获得约300美元收益。
articles.why: AI公司盈利可能惠及普通人，但具体方案未定，需持续关注。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 关注AI公司如何分配收益，未来可能影响你的钱包。
articles.for_me: 暂时不用管。但如果你备考AI研究生，了解AI公司商业模式对面试有帮助。

articles.title: AI眼镜变轻了，没摄像头
articles.summary: Solos发布AirGo A6智能眼镜，重仅19克，无摄像头，靠语音交互。
articles.why: 轻便无摄像头的AI眼镜更注重隐私，适合日常佩戴，是AI穿戴设备新方向。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 关注AI眼镜的隐私设计，未来可能成为学习助手（如实时翻译）。
articles.for_me: 对英语学习有用！未来AI眼镜可实时翻译英语对话，帮你练习口语。

articles.title: 用AI第一步：承认自己笨
articles.summary: 文章指出使用AI时，用户需要先明确自己的需求，才能让AI发挥最大作用。
articles.why: 新手常犯的错误是问得太模糊，学会清晰提问是AI入门关键。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 练习向AI提具体问题，比如“帮我翻译这段英文”而不是“帮我学英语”。
articles.for_me: 非常实用！你学英语时，用AI要问具体问题，比如“解释这个语法点”而不是“教我英语”。

articles.title: DeepSeek招聘被吐槽不专业
articles.summary: 华为天才少年公开吐槽DeepSeek面试流程不专业，引发对AI公司招聘质量的讨论。
articles.why: AI公司扩张中可能忽视招聘质量，对求职者来说是提醒。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 如果你未来想进AI公司，注意考察面试流程是否规范。
articles.for_me: 备考AI研究生时，这条新闻提醒你：未来求职要擦亮眼，选择靠谱公司。

plain_summary: 今天AI圈挺热闹，几个大新闻对新手很友好。Meta出了个新AI模型，能把你朋友“拉”进AI照片里，Instagram上就能玩，挺有意思。Anthropic的Claude Cowork终于上了手机和网页，以后随时能用AI帮忙写英语作文或翻译，对学英语的你来说是个好消息。微软开始用自家模型省钱，可能让AI工具更便宜。不过Discord的AI审核闹了乌龙，误封了不少人，提醒咱们别全信AI。还有个新App能防AI诈骗，比如假绑架电话，建议下载防身。另外，开源AI和付费AI其实不冲突，各有各的用处，备考时记得搞清区别。OpenAI说要给美国公民发钱，但还没定，先当八卦看。AI眼镜变轻了还没摄像头，未来可能帮你实时翻译英语。最后，用AI第一步是学会问问题，别上来就“教我英语”，要具体点。对了，DeepSeek招聘被吐槽不专业，以后找工作得留个心眼。今天整体趋势是：AI工具越来越亲民，但也要小心坑，新手多试多问就行。

top_starred.name: affaan-m/ECC
top_starred.desc: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
top_starred.tagline: AI代理性能优化系统，支持多种开发工具。
top_starred.explanation: 这个项目是一个AI代理（可以理解为智能助手）的性能优化系统，它让AI代理拥有技能、直觉、记忆、安全性和研究优先的开发能力。它支持Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等流行开发工具。对于普通人来说，如果你在使用AI编程助手，这个系统可以让你的AI助手更聪明、更高效，比如记住你的偏好、自动优化代码。适合开发者或AI爱好者，需要一定的技术基础来配置和集成。

top_starred.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
top_starred.desc: The agent that grows with you
top_starred.explanation: 这是一个AI代理项目，强调代理会随着你的使用而成长和适应。它解决的是AI代理缺乏个性化和持续学习的问题。你可以把它当作一个智能助手，它会根据你的反馈和交互不断改进自己的行为。例如，你可以训练它帮你管理日程、回复邮件，它会越来越懂你的习惯。适合希望拥有个性化AI助手的用户，上手难度中等，需要一些编程知识来部署和训练。

top_starred.name: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
top_starred.desc: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
top_starred.tagline: 让每个人都能使用和构建的AI代理。
top_starred.explanation: AutoGPT是一个开源项目，目标是让AI代理（智能助手）变得人人可用。它解决的是AI代理复杂难用的问题，提供工具让你专注于重要的事情。你可以用它来自动完成各种任务，比如自动搜索信息、生成报告、管理社交媒体。例如，你可以让AutoGPT自动研究一个主题并写出总结。适合所有对AI感兴趣的人，但需要一定的技术知识来安装和配置。

top_starred.name: ollama/ollama
top_starred.desc: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
top_starred.tagline: 本地运行多种大语言模型的工具。
top_starred.explanation: Ollama是一个让你在本地电脑上运行各种大语言模型（如Kimi、DeepSeek、Qwen等）的工具。它解决的是使用AI模型需要联网和付费的问题，让你离线免费使用。你可以用它来聊天、写作、编程辅助等。例如，你可以下载一个模型，然后像ChatGPT一样与它对话。适合注重隐私或希望离线使用AI的用户，上手简单，有命令行基础即可。

top_starred.name: f/prompts.chat
top_starred.desc: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
top_starred.tagline: 社区驱动的ChatGPT提示词分享平台。
top_starred.explanation: 这是一个收集和分享ChatGPT提示词（prompts，即你给AI的指令）的网站。它解决的是很多人不知道如何有效使用ChatGPT的问题。你可以在这里发现别人写好的提示词，直接复制使用，比如“写一篇关于环保的演讲稿”或“用莎士比亚风格写诗”。你也可以自己贡献提示词。适合所有ChatGPT用户，无需技术，直接访问网站即可。

trending.name: synthetic-sciences/openscience
trending.desc: The open-source AI workbench for scientific research
trending.explanation: 这是一个面向科学研究的开源AI工作台，帮助科学家用AI加速研究。它解决的是科研中数据处理、实验设计等繁琐问题。例如，你可以用它来分析实验数据、自动生成图表、甚至辅助写论文。适合科研人员或学生，需要一定的编程和AI知识，但项目提供了友好的界面。

trending.name: isjiamu/gzh-design-skill
trending.desc: 把 Markdown 一键排成可直接粘进公众号编辑器的精致 HTML —— 6 套精选主题 + 主题生成器 + 双关卡校验。An AI-agent skill that turns Markdown into paste-ready WeChat article HTML.
trending.tagline: Markdown一键转精美公众号文章。
trending.explanation: 这是一个工具，能把Markdown格式的文本一键转换成可以直接粘贴到微信公众号编辑器的精美HTML。它解决的是公众号排版费时的问题。你只需用Markdown写好文章，选择主题，就能生成漂亮的排版。例如，技术博主可以用它快速发布教程。适合公众号运营者，上手简单，无需编程。

trending.name: jmerelnyc/Talos
trending.desc: GPU worker client for the Talos network. Pairs with your Talos account, serves open-model inference jobs over a WebSocket, and reports uptime for payouts.
trending.tagline: 为Talos网络贡献GPU算力赚取收益。
trending.explanation: 这是一个GPU客户端，让你将自己的电脑GPU（显卡）连接到Talos网络，为AI推理任务提供算力，并获得报酬。它解决的是AI公司需要大量算力而个人闲置算力浪费的问题。你可以让电脑在空闲时运行这个程序，自动接受任务并赚取收益。适合有闲置GPU的玩家或矿工，需要一些技术配置。

trending.name: uzairansaruzi/hermex
trending.desc: Native iPhone app for your Hermes agent
trending.explanation: 这是一个为iPhone设计的原生应用，用于连接和管理你的Hermes AI代理。它解决的是移动端使用AI代理不便的问题。你可以通过这个应用与你的AI代理对话、下达任务，比如让它帮你查天气、设置提醒。适合Hermes代理的用户，上手简单，下载App即可。

trending.name: simonlin1212/Vibe-Research
trending.desc: Vibe-Research: Your Personal Trading Research Agent · A股/美股/港股 的个人投研 Agent：每日复盘、资讯雷达、个股数据、板块中心、我的持仓、研究记录。Vibe-Research 把数据和功能配齐，由你自己的 AI 驱动投资研究。
trending.tagline: 个人AI投研助手，覆盖A股/美股/港股。
trending.explanation: 这是一个个人投资研究AI代理，帮你分析A股、美股、港股市场。它解决的是个人投资者信息获取和分析效率低的问题。功能包括每日复盘、资讯雷达、个股数据、板块分析、持仓管理等。例如，你可以让它每天自动生成市场总结，或者分析某只股票的技术指标。适合股民或投资者，需要一定的金融知识，但操作简单。

spaces.name: smolagents/hf-realtime-voice
spaces.desc: Voice chat over WebSocket against a HF speech-to-speech
spaces.tagline: 实时语音聊天，直接和AI对话
spaces.explanation: ① 这是一个能让你和AI实时语音聊天的应用，就像打电话一样。它把你说的话转成文字，AI理解后生成回答，再转成语音读给你听，整个过程几乎无延迟。② 比如你在学英语，可以跟它练习口语对话，它会像真人一样回应你，帮你纠正发音或语法。③ 上手很简单：打开网页，点击麦克风说话就行，不需要任何技术知识。

spaces.name: Sneak-Moose/Pro-Realism-Edit-Studio
spaces.desc: Powerful image editing - supports one or two input images.
spaces.tagline: 强大图片编辑，支持单张或双图
spaces.explanation: ① 这是一个图片编辑工具，可以处理一张或两张图片，实现高级编辑效果，比如换背景、融合两张图、修复瑕疵等。② 比如你想把旅游照片中的人换成自己，或者把两张风景照合成一张，上传图片后输入文字描述，AI就会自动处理。③ 上手容易：在网页上传图片，用文字描述你要的效果，点击生成即可，无需PS技能。

spaces.name: kulkas2pintu/wan555
spaces.desc: generate a video from an image with a text prompt
spaces.tagline: 用文字和图片生成视频
spaces.explanation: ① 这个应用可以根据你提供的一张图片和一段文字描述，自动生成一段视频。比如你给一张风景照，加上“下雨”的文字，它就会生成该场景下雨的动态视频。② 学英语时，你可以用它把单词或句子变成生动视频，帮助记忆。比如输入“cat”和一张猫的图片，生成猫在玩耍的视频。③ 上手简单：上传图片，输入文字，点击生成，等待几秒即可。

spaces.name: baidu/Unlimited-OCR
spaces.explanation: ① 这是一个文字识别工具，可以从图片中提取文字，比如扫描文档、截图、照片里的文字，而且不限次数免费使用。② 比如你看到一张英文海报，想快速复制上面的文字，上传图片后它就能识别出文字，你可以直接复制到笔记里学习。③ 上手非常简单：上传图片，点击识别，几秒后得到文字结果，完全免费。

spaces.name: AimeeBingmouQu/ProtectBirds
spaces.explanation: ① 这是一个用于保护鸟类的AI应用，可能通过识别鸟类种类、监测鸟类活动来帮助科研或保护工作。② 比如你在野外拍到一只鸟，上传照片，AI会告诉你这是什么鸟，有什么习性，帮助学习鸟类知识。③ 上手难度：可能需要在特定平台使用，但操作类似普通图片识别，上传即可。

models.name: empero-ai/Qwythos-9B-Claude-Mythos-5-1M-GGUF
models.tagline: 超长上下文的高性能语言模型
models.explanation: ① 这是一个文本生成模型，特点是支持超长上下文（100万token），能记住大量信息，适合处理长文档、对话历史等。② 比如你让它分析一本英文小说，它能记住前面所有情节，回答关于人物关系的问题，帮你理解复杂内容。③ 上手难度：需要调用API或使用支持该模型的平台，对新手有一定门槛，但可借助现成工具。

models.name: tencent/Hy3
models.tagline: 腾讯出品的高效文本生成模型
models.explanation: ① 这是腾讯开发的文本生成模型，擅长理解和生成自然语言，可用于对话、写作、翻译等任务。② 比如你写英语作文时，可以输入题目，让它帮你生成范文或修改语法错误，提高写作水平。③ 上手难度：需要API调用，但网上有现成的演示页面，直接输入文字即可体验。

models.name: zai-org/GLM-5.2
models.tagline: 智谱AI的最新大语言模型
models.explanation: ① 这是智谱AI（清华系）开发的GLM系列最新版本，能进行文本生成、问答、翻译等，性能强大。② 比如你备考AI方向，可以问它“什么是Transformer”，它会用通俗语言解释，并举例说明。③ 上手难度：可通过官方平台或API使用，有免费额度，新手也能快速体验。

models.name: baidu/Unlimited-OCR
models.tagline: 百度无限次文字识别模型
models.explanation: ① 这是百度开发的OCR模型，能从图片中提取文字，支持多种语言，且免费无限次使用。② 比如你看到一张英文菜单，拍照后它能识别出所有文字，方便你学习单词或翻译。③ 上手难度：直接上传图片即可，非常容易。

models.name: InternScience/Agents-A1
models.tagline: 智能体框架，让AI自主完成任务
models.explanation: ① 这是一个智能体（Agent）框架，让AI能自主规划并执行复杂任务，比如调用工具、搜索信息、写代码等。② 比如你让它“帮我找一篇关于AI的英文论文并总结”，它会自动搜索、下载、阅读并输出总结，节省时间。③ 上手难度：需要一定编程基础，但未来可能有可视化工具降低门槛。

items.title_en: OmniOpt: Taxonomy, Geometry, and Benchmarking of Modern Optimizers
items.summary: Optimizer selection for large-scale model training has become a system-level design decision constrained jointly by compute, memory, tuning budget, and task diversity, yet the landscape of over one hundred methods remains fragmented. We therefore present OmniOpt, a unified survey and benchmark cookbook of optimizers for the research community. OmniOpt rests on four coupled components. First, we treat every optimizer update as a structured transformation through a five-stage meta-pipeline, and sh
items.title_cn: OmniOpt：现代优化器的分类、几何与基准测试
items.note: 统一梳理上百种优化器，适合了解优化器分类和选型，新手可掌握基础概念。

items.title_en: UI-MOPD: Multi-Platform On-Policy Distillation for Continual GUI Agent Learning
items.summary: Recent advances in multimodal foundation models and agent systems have driven GUI agents from single-platform task execution toward cross-platform interaction. However, building multi-platform GUI agents remains challenging. On one hand, high-quality and executable cross-platform interaction trajectories are still scarce, and existing data often suffer from limited platform coverage. On the other hand, different platforms exhibit distinct interaction conventions, making joint or continual traini
items.title_cn: UI-MOPD：面向持续GUI智能体学习的多平台同策略蒸馏
items.note: 研究跨平台GUI智能体训练，涉及持续学习，对理解智能体泛化有帮助。

items.title_en: ResearchStudio-Reel: Automate the Last Mile of Research from Paper to Poster, Video, and Blog
items.summary: Research dissemination, turning a paper into a poster, a talk video, and a blog post, is still a manual last mile. Prior automation treats each artifact in isolation that each re-extract the paper from scratch, usually ship one-way renders the author cannot reopen in PowerPoint or Word, and gates quality on soft VLM-preference scores that plateau while load-bearing sections still read as empty. We argue this last mile is best built as a composition of skills: thin agent-readable contracts that s
items.title_cn: ResearchStudio-Reel：自动化研究论文到海报、视频和博客的最后一步
items.note: 自动将论文转化为多种展示形式，了解科研传播自动化趋势即可。

items.title_en: PixWorld: Unifying 3D Scene Generation and Reconstruction in Pixel Space
items.summary: 3D reconstruction and generation are commonly tackled by separate paradigms: pixel-based regression for reconstruction, and latent diffusion for generation. Recent works attempt to unify them in latent space, but with notable drawbacks: the diffusion objective is defined on latent features rather than the underlying 3D representation, and both branches suffer from information loss introduced by latent encoding, while requiring a pretrained Variational Autoencoder (VAE) or Representation Autoenco
items.title_cn: PixWorld：在像素空间中统一3D场景生成与重建
items.note: 统一3D生成与重建，涉及像素空间和潜在空间对比，新手可了解方向。

items.title_en: ResearchStudio-Idea: An Evidence-Grounded Research-Ideation Skill Suite from ML Conference Outcomes
items.summary: Large language models have made research ideation increasingly accessible, yet effective idea development requires more than generating candidate directions. Researchers must ground a problem in current literature, identify meaningful bottlenecks, differentiate from existing solutions, and evaluate risks before committing to implementation. We present ResearchStudio-Idea as a reusable skill suite for this first mile of research ideation. The suite includes Paper-Search, a standalone multi-source
items.title_cn: ResearchStudio-Idea：基于证据的研究构思技能套件
items.note: 辅助科研构思，结合文献搜索与瓶颈分析，对学术入门有启发。

items.title_en: The Mirage of Optimizing Training Policies: Monotonic Inference Policies as the Real Objective for LLM Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has gained growing attention in large language model (LLM) post-training, yet RL training remains fragile and can suffer from instability or collapse. One vital cause is training-inference mismatch: LLM adopts separate inference and training engines for generation efficiency and training precision, which in practice exhibits inconsistent probabilities for the same trajectories on training and inference sides, even with synchronized model parameters. This naturally ind
items.title_cn: 优化训练策略的幻象：单调推理策略才是LLM强化学习的真正目标
items.note: 分析LLM强化学习中训练与推理不一致问题，对理解RL训练有帮助。

items.title_en: Embodied.cpp: A Portable Inference Runtime of Embodied AI Models on Heterogeneous Robots
items.summary: Embodied AI models now span vision-language-action (VLA) models and world-action models (WAMs), but practical deployment remains fragmented across model-specific Python stacks, backend assumptions, and robot-side glue code, especially on heterogeneous edge devices. Existing inference runtimes are designed mainly for request-response serving and therefore do not satisfy the runtime contract of embodied deployment: multi-rate execution inside closed-loop control, latency-first batch-1 inference on
items.title_cn: Embodied.cpp：面向异构机器人的具身AI模型便携推理运行时
items.note: 为具身AI模型提供跨平台推理，了解边缘部署挑战即可。

items.title_en: DataComp-VLM: Improved Open Datasets for Vision-Language Models
items.summary: Building performant Vision-Language Models (VLMs) requires carefully curating large-scale training datasets, yet the community lacks systematic benchmarks for evaluating such curation strategies. We introduce DataComp for VLMs (DCVLM), a benchmark for controlled data-centric experiments to improve VLM training. As part of DCVLM, we collect 160 datasets spanning four data types -- image-caption pairs, multimodal interleaved documents, text-only, and instruction-tuning data -- into a corpus of 6T
items.title_cn: DataComp-VLM：改进的视觉语言模型开放数据集
items.note: 系统评估VLM数据策略，新手可关注数据质量对模型的影响。

items.title_en: OrbitQuant: Data-Agnostic Quantization for Image and Video Diffusion Transformers
items.summary: Diffusion transformers (DiTs) achieve state-of-the-art image and video generation, but their multi-step sampling and growing parameter count make inference expensive. Post-training quantization (PTQ) is the natural remedy, yet DiT activations shift across timesteps, prompts, and guidance branches, forcing prior methods to re-fit calibration data for every new checkpoint or modality. We present OrbitQuant, a data-agnostic weight-activation quantizer that bypasses range estimation by quantizing in
items.title_cn: OrbitQuant：图像和视频扩散Transformer的数据无关量化
items.note: 提出无需校准数据的量化方法，加速扩散模型推理，了解量化概念即可。

items.title_en: VLA-Corrector: Lightweight Detect-and-Correct Inference for Adaptive Action Horizon
items.summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) foundation models have recently achieved strong progress in embodied intelligence. To reduce policy-call frequency while preserving temporal coherence, most generative policies adopt an action chunk mechanism, executing multiple future actions in an open-loop manner under a fixed action horizon. However, this "predict-then-blindly-execute" paradigm sacrifices closed-loop reactivity: in contact-rich physical interactions, even small local perturbations can rapidly amp
items.title_cn: VLA-Corrector：面向自适应动作视野的轻量级检测与校正推理
items.note: 改进VLA模型动作预测的闭环反应能力，对具身智能感兴趣可看。

items.title_en: Program-as-Weights: A Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions
items.summary: Many everyday programming tasks resist clean rule-based implementation, such as alerting on important log lines, repairing malformed JSON, or ranking search results by intent, and are increasingly outsourced to large language model APIs at the cost of locality, reproducibility, and price. We propose fuzzy-function programming: compiling such a function from a natural-language specification into a compact, locally-executable neural artifact. We instantiate this paradigm with Program-as-Weights (P
items.title_cn: Program-as-Weights：面向模糊函数的编程范式
items.note: 用自然语言编译成神经网络，实现模糊函数，了解新编程范式即可。

items.title_en: AgenticSTS: A Bounded-Memory Testbed for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
items.summary: Memory for a long-horizon LLM agent is a contract about what each future decision is allowed to see. The simplest contract appends past observations, tool calls, and reflections to every prompt, which makes prior context easy to access but also turns it into a jumbled mixture in which the effect of any single memory component is hard to isolate. We introduce and instrument an alternative bounded contract: every decision is made from a fresh user message assembled by typed retrieval, with no raw
items.title_cn: AgenticSTS：面向长程LLM智能体的有界记忆测试平台
items.note: 研究智能体记忆管理，对比不同记忆合约，对理解智能体设计有帮助。

items.title_en: EvoPolicyGym: Evaluating Autonomous Policy Evolution in Interactive Environments
items.summary: Autonomous agents are increasingly expected to improve executable policies through feedback, yet existing evaluations often collapse this process into a final score or confound it with open-ended software-engineering progress. We introduce Autonomous Policy Evolution, a controlled evaluation setting in which a harness-model agent repeatedly edits an executable policy system under a fixed interaction budget. We instantiate this setting in EvoPolicyGym, a benchmark built from compact interactive R
items.title_cn: EvoPolicyGym：在交互环境中评估自主策略演化
items.note: 评估智能体自主改进策略的能力，了解演化式学习评估方法。

items.title_en: Morphing into Hybrid Attention Models
items.summary: Hybrid attention models improve long-context efficiency by retaining only a subset of full-attention layers and replacing the remaining layers with linear attention. However, the effectiveness of Transformer-to-hybrid conversion critically depends on which layers preserve full attention. Existing hybrid layer selection methods typically rely on heuristic strategies such as fixed placement patterns or layerwise scoring, implicitly treating layer importance as isolated and overlooking the interdep
items.title_cn: 变形为混合注意力模型
items.note: 优化Transformer转混合注意力时层选择策略，了解注意力机制变体。

items.title_en: Multi-Resolution Flow Matching: Training-Free Diffusion Acceleration via Staged Sampling
items.summary: Hardware-agnostic strategies for accelerating text-to-image diffusion, such as timestep distillation and feature caching, can reduce inference time without custom kernels or system-level optimization. Among them, multi-resolution generation strategies have recently received broad attention, attaining more than 5x speedup without any training. However, the design of performing upsampling in the latent space, together with the selective modification of partial regions, causes these methods to exhi
items.title_cn: 多分辨率流匹配：通过分阶段采样实现免训练扩散加速
items.note: 无需训练加速文本到图像扩散，了解多分辨率采样策略即可。

items.title_en: PerceptionRubrics: Calibrating Multimodal Evaluation to Human Perception
items.summary: We introduce PerceptionRubrics, a rubric-based evaluation framework that addresses the gap between saturated benchmark scores and real-world brittleness. Shifting evaluation from holistic semantic matching to rigorous atomic auditing, PerceptionRubrics pairs 1,038 information-dense images with over 12,000 instance-specific rubrics. These criteria are derived from golden captions constructed via a novel Circular Peer-Review consensus pipeline and then distilled into a dual-stream system of Must-R
items.title_cn: PerceptionRubrics：将多模态评估校准到人类感知
items.note: 提出基于规则的细粒度多模态评估，对理解评估标准有帮助。

items.title_en: TurboServe: Serving Streaming Video Generation Efficiently and Economically
items.summary: Streaming video generation is emerging as a new serving workload in which users interact with long-lived sessions that generate video progressively, chunk by chunk. Unlike offline video generation or typical LLM serving, streaming video generation must preserve session state across active and idle periods, repeatedly schedule ongoing sessions, and deliver each chunk under a tight latency target. This creates two key serving challenges in multi-user, multi-GPU environments: session duration heter
items.title_cn: TurboServe：高效经济的流式视频生成服务
items.note: 优化流式视频生成服务，涉及多用户多GPU调度，了解服务挑战即可。

items.title_en: ELDR: Expert-Locality-Aware Decode Routing for PD-Disaggregated MoE Serving
items.summary: In prefill-decode (PD) disaggregated LLM serving, each request is assigned to a decode worker after prefill. Existing decode routers balance only load; for mixture-of-experts (MoE) models this is incomplete: equally loaded workers can differ in latency, since each decode step loads the weights of every distinct expert its batch activates. We present ELDR, an expert-locality-aware decode router for PD-disaggregated MoE serving. From a request's prefill expert activations, ELDR builds an expert si
items.title_cn: ELDR：面向PD分离MoE服务的专家局部感知解码路由
items.note: 优化MoE模型解码路由，考虑专家局部性，了解推理优化方法。

items.title_en: MemSyco-Bench: Benchmarking Sycophancy in Agent Memory
items.summary: Memory has emerged as a cornerstone of modern LLM-based agents, supporting their evolution from single-turn assistants to long-term collaborators. However, memory is not always beneficial: retrieved memories often induce a critical issue of sycophancy, causing agents to over-align with the user at the cost of factual accuracy or objective reasoning. Despite this emerging risk, existing memory benchmarks primarily evaluate whether memories are correctly stored, retrieved, or updated, while overlo
items.title_cn: MemSyco-Bench：智能体记忆中的谄媚行为基准测试
items.note: 评估智能体记忆导致的谄媚问题，对理解AI对齐有帮助。

items.title_en: Seed2.0 Model Card: Towards Intelligence Frontier for Real-World Complexity
items.summary: We present Seed2.0, a model series that takes a meaningful step toward solving complex, real-world tasks. Our approach begins with identifying users' genuine needs and constructing a reliable, forward-looking evaluation system by selecting and abstracting benchmarks grounded in these needs and in realistic, complex scenarios. Guided by this evaluation system, Seed2.0 targets two persistent challenges, long-tail knowledge and complex instruction following, substantially improving the model's reli
items.title_cn: Seed2.0模型卡：迈向真实世界复杂性的智能前沿
items.note: 介绍Seed2.0模型系列，针对长尾知识和复杂指令，了解前沿模型进展。

items.title_en: Orca: The World is in Your Mind
items.summary: We introduce Orca, an initial instantiation of a general world foundation model. Orca learns a unified world latent space from multimodal world signals and exposes it through multimodal readout interfaces. Rather than optimizing isolated next-token, next-frame, or next-action prediction, we are centered on Next-State-Prediction modeling, offering a unified state-transition modeling route toward understanding, predicting, and acting upon the world. Orca learns through two complementary paradigms:
items.title_cn: Orca：世界在你的脑海中
items.note: 提出世界基础模型，统一多模态预测，了解世界模型概念。

items.title_en: Dockerless: Environment-Free Program Verifier for Coding Agents
items.summary: Program verifiers play a central role in training coding agents, including selecting trajectories for supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and providing rewards for reinforcement learning (RL). Standard execution-based verification requires running unit tests inside per-repository environments such as Docker images, incurring substantial environment setup costs. We propose Dockerless, an environment-free agentic patch verifier that evaluates generated code patches without executing them. Rather than sim
items.title_cn: Dockerless：面向编码智能体的无环境程序验证器
items.note: 无需执行代码即可验证补丁，降低环境成本，了解代码智能体训练。

items.title_en: DOPD: Dual On-policy Distillation
items.summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) offers superior capacity transfer by supervising student-sampled trajectories with dense token-level signals. To furnish high-quality supervision sources and thereby elevate the performance frontier of distillation, an intuitive direction is to infuse privileged information to either teacher or student itself. However, this additional input induces a potential failure mode we dub privilege illusion: a pattern that conflates the transferable capability gap that studen
items.title_cn: DOPD：双同策略蒸馏
items.note: 改进同策略蒸馏，避免特权信息导致的幻觉，了解知识蒸馏技术。

items.title_en: BlockPilot: Instance-Adaptive Policy Learning for Diffusion-based Speculative Decoding
items.summary: Speculative decoding accelerates inference by using a lightweight draft model to generate candidate tokens in parallel, and are then verified by the target model, enabling lossless acceleration. Recently, diffusion-based speculative decoding further improves parallelism by generating multiple tokens per forward pass via block-level diffusion, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance. However, existing methods adopt a fixed inference block size and assume a uniform optimal decoding strategy
items.title_cn: BlockPilot：面向扩散推测解码的实例自适应策略学习
items.note: 自适应块大小加速推测解码，了解推理加速方法。

items.title_en: Does VLA Even Know the Basics? Measuring Commonsense and World Knowledge Retention in Vision-Language-Action Models
items.summary: Embodied Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are typically obtained by fine-tuning powerful pretrained VLMs on robotics data, yet it is unclear how much commonsense and factual knowledge they retain after adaptation. Failures on knowledge-sensitive tasks are ambiguous, conflating missing knowledge with poor generalization of low-level control. We introduce Act2Answer, a lightweight protocol that adapts VLM knowledge benchmarks to VLA evaluation by requiring agents to answer through action. Each
items.title_cn: VLA模型是否了解基础？测量视觉-语言-动作模型中的常识和世界知识保留
items.note: 评估VLA模型微调后知识保留，对理解具身智能知识迁移有帮助。

items.title_en: Agentic Abstention: Do Agents Know When to Stop Instead of Act?
items.summary: LLM agents are expected to act over multiple turns, using search, browsing interfaces, and terminal tools to complete user goals. Yet not every goal is well specified or achievable in the available environment. In such cases, a reliable agent should recognize that further interaction is unlikely to help and abstain from additional tool calls. We define Agentic Abstention, the problem of deciding when an agent should stop acting under uncertainty. Unlike standard LLM abstention, which is usually
items.title_cn: 智能体弃权：智能体知道何时停止而非行动吗？
items.note: 研究智能体何时应放弃行动，对理解AI安全与可靠性有帮助。

items.title_en: Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent
items.summary: We introduce Agents-A1, a 35B Mixture-of-Experts Agentic Model that reaches trillion-parameter-level performance by scaling the agent horizon. We investigate agent-horizon scaling from two perspectives: scaling long-horizon trajectories and scaling heterogeneous agent abilities. To support this goal, we build a long-horizon knowledge-action infrastructure that connects external knowledge, actions, observations, and verifier outcomes, producing agentic trajectories with an average length of 45K t
items.title_cn: 扩展视野而非参数：用35B智能体达到万亿参数性能
items.note: 通过扩展智能体轨迹长度提升性能，了解智能体缩放定律。

items.title_en: LiveEdit: Towards Real-Time Diffusion-Based Streaming Video Editing
items.summary: Streaming video editing has made rapid progress, yet practical deployment is still limited by two core issues: maintaining stable backgrounds and non-edited regions over time, and achieving the low latency required for real-time interactive scenarios. Meanwhile, recent streaming video generation methods are mostly developed for synthesis and cannot be directly applied to editing due to the strict preservation requirement and region-specific control. In this work, we present a novel streaming vid
items.title_cn: LiveEdit：面向实时扩散流式视频编辑
items.note: 实现低延迟流式视频编辑，了解视频编辑前沿。

items.title_en: ReFreeKV: Towards Threshold-Free KV Cache Compression
items.summary: To reduce memory consumption during LLM inference, a handful of methods have been proposed for KV cache pruning. While these techniques can accomplish lossless memory reduction on many datasets, they often hinge on an under-emphasized condition: an input/domain-specific threshold for KV cache budget needs to be pre-determined to achieve the optimal performance. However, such input-sensitive design may be considerably limited in real-world scenarios, as open-domain inputs span diverse domains, le
items.title_cn: ReFreeKV：面向无阈值KV缓存压缩
items.note: 无需预定义阈值的KV缓存压缩，了解LLM推理优化。

items.title_en: TUA-Bench: A Benchmark for General-Purpose Terminal-Use Agents
items.summary: As large language models and harness frameworks continue to advance, agents operating in terminals are increasingly capable of performing a broader range of general computer-use tasks beyond coding. However, existing benchmarks do not adequately evaluate general-purpose terminal computer-use agents (TUAs): general computer-use benchmarks primarily target graphical user interfaces (GUIs), whereas terminal-based benchmarks largely emphasize technical and programming-centric workflows historically
items.title_cn: TUA-Bench：通用终端使用智能体基准测试
items.note: 评估终端通用智能体，了解终端自动化评估。

items.title_en: Formalizing Latent Thoughts: Four Axioms of Thought Representation in LLMs
items.summary: We introduce an axiomatic evaluation framework for latent thought representations in LLMs, comprising metrics that are independent of downstream benchmark scores and reveal representational failures that benchmark accuracy masks. Existing evaluations conflate representation quality with model capacity. Therefore, failures cannot be attributed to the representation rather than to the model that processes it. We formalize four functional axioms (Causality, Minimality, Separability, and Stability)
items.title_cn: 形式化潜在思维：LLM中思维表示的四条公理
items.note: 提出评估LLM潜在思维表示的公理，对理解模型内部表示有帮助。

items.title_en: PhysisForcing: Physics Reinforced World Simulator for Robotic Manipulation
items.summary: Video generation models have emerged as a promising paradigm for embodied world simulation. However, both general-domain video generators and robot-specific data fine-tuned models can still produce physically implausible manipulations, including discontinuous motion trajectories and inconsistent robot-object interactions, which limits their reliability as world simulators. Through extensive experiments, we find that such physical instability mainly arises from two factors: deformation of moving
items.title_cn: PhysisForcing：面向机器人操作的物理增强世界模拟器
items.note: 改进视频生成模型的物理合理性，了解机器人模拟器。

items.title_en: Qwen-Image-2.0-RL Technical Report
items.summary: We present Qwen-Image-2.0-RL, a post-training pipeline that applies reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and on-policy distillation (OPD) to improve both the visual quality and instruction-following capability of the Qwen-Image-2.0 diffusion model. To provide reliable reward signals, we construct task-specific composite reward models by fine-tuning vision-language models with a pointwise scoring paradigm and chain-of-thought reasoning. For text-to-image generation, the reward models
items.title_cn: Qwen-Image-2.0-RL技术报告
items.note: 用强化学习提升图像生成质量，了解RLHF在扩散模型中的应用。

items.title_en: Translation as a Bridging Action: Transferring Manipulation Skills from Humans to Robots
items.summary: We study whether we can learn novel manipulation skills from human actions to a bi-manual robot with parallel grippers. Human action data is cheap, abundant, and diverse, making it one of the most promising resources for scaling up robot learning. Yet transferring skills from humans to robots remains hard: most prior work treats humans as just another bi-manual 6DoF embodiment, where hand-pose estimates are noisy and the contact patterns of human fingers differ fundamentally from those of a para
items.title_cn: 翻译作为桥接动作：将操作技能从人类转移到机器人
items.note: 从人类动作学习机器人技能，了解技能迁移方法。

items.title_en: Qwen-RobotManip Technical Report: Alignment Unlocks Scale for Robotic Manipulation Foundation Models
items.summary: Foundation models in language and multimodality achieve strong generalization by aligning heterogeneous data under a unified formulation and training at scale. In this report, we investigate whether this scaling recipe can be applied to robotic manipulation to achieve genuine generalization. This is challenging because, unlike text, manipulation data is heterogeneous by nature, expensive to collect, and narrow in diversity, making alignment and scale simultaneously difficult. We present Qwen-Rob
items.title_cn: Qwen-RobotManip技术报告：对齐解锁机器人操作基础模型的规模
items.note: 探索机器人操作基础模型的对齐与规模化，了解具身智能前沿。

huggingface.models_summary: 这些热门模型（6-10）反映了两个趋势：一是模型能力越来越强，支持超长上下文（如Qwythos-9B），能处理更复杂任务；二是大厂和开源社区齐发力，腾讯、智谱、百度等都推出高性能模型，且免费可用。对新手来说，值得关注的是：多尝试不同模型，了解它们的特点（如长上下文、智能体），这有助于备考AI方向时理解技术演进。
huggingface.papers_summary: 这批论文热点集中在几个方向：一是大模型训练与推理优化，如优化器、量化、KV缓存压缩、推测解码等；二是智能体（Agent）相关，包括GUI智能体、代码智能体、终端智能体、记忆管理、弃权机制等；三是多模态与具身智能，如VLA模型、3D生成、视频生成与编辑、机器人操作；四是评估与对齐，如多模态评估、谄媚行为、知识保留等。新手应记住的关键词有：强化学习、知识蒸馏、量化、推测解码、智能体、多模态、具身智能、对齐。
